page: Microsoft Azure NV12s_v2 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the NVSv2 server family. It is equipped with 12 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system features a high memory allocation of 224.0 GB, translating to 18.67 GB of RAM per core.

This server type includes a single integrated GPU and provides 1509 GB of local storage. It is also designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk configurations. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this instance.

Given the combination of a dedicated GPU, substantial memory density, and local storage, the NV12s_v2 is designed for workloads requiring accelerated graphics, memory-intensive computations, and database operations. The high resource density per vCPU provides a specialized hardware profile for workloads that require significant memory and GPU acceleration relative to the core count.
description: Microsoft Azure NV12s_v2 is an x86_64 virtual machine in the NVSv2 family, powered by an Intel processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated vCPUs paired with 224.0 GB of memory, yielding a high ratio of 18.67 GB of RAM per core. The hardware configuration includes a single GPU and 1509 GB of local storage, with support for Premium Storage. This instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Lacking benchmark data, its hardware profile indicates suitability for memory-intensive applications, database hosting, and GPU-accelerated workloads. The high memory-to-core ratio and dedicated GPU make it a specialized option for resource-dense tasks that require substantial memory capacity alongside hardware acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NV12s_v2 is an x86_64 virtual machine featuring 12 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 224.0 GB of RAM, a single GPU, and 1509 GB of local storage, optimized for memory-intensive and GPU-accelerated workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure NV12s_v2 is an x86_64 VM with 12 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 224.0 GB RAM, one GPU, and 1509 GB local storage for GPU-accelerated workloads.
tagline: An accelerated virtual machine featuring high memory density, dedicated GPU capabilities, and substantial local storage for demanding workloads.
bullet_points: 12 dedicated Intel vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
224.0 GB of system memory providing 18.67 GB per core
One integrated GPU for hardware-accelerated tasks
1509 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Suited for memory-intensive databases and GPU workloads
